_help: pipeline:       Which pipeline variant to run.
tier:           Parallelism level. Controls worker counts (IFC/grid/validate).
publish:        Whether to publish results to AGOL after the run.
publish_target: Which AGOL folder/publisher to use (only when publish=true).
'auto' (default) — picks the matching publisher for the pipeline:
no_filter:      Disable the deep model filter (v3 only).
false (default) — apply filter, exclude deep underground models without tunnel
true            — skip filter, process ALL models (berg volume will be inflated)
fresh:          Clear IFC cache and reimport all files from source (v3 only).
false (default) — use cached GDBs for unchanged IFC files
true            — delete cache, reimport everything (slower but guarantees fresh data)
test:           Run in test mode (only 10 IFC files, for quick validation).
Minimal trigger: {} — runs v3, moderate tier, no publish, filter on, cached, full run.
To start a run, upload this file as 'trigger.json' in the pipeline_runs folder.
